zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Lovel於1305年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel29歲，母親Muriel Soulis26歲。她和Sir John de Moels至少有2個女兒。她去世於1337年8月21日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Lovel was born in 1305, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel, was 29 and her mother, Muriel Soulis, was 26. She had at least 2 daughters with Sir John de Moels. She died on 21 August 1337, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Lovel est née en 1305, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Muriel Soulis, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Sir John de Moels. Elle est décédée le 21 août 1337, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Lovel 1305 in Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel 29 und ihre Mutter Muriel Soulis 26. Sie hatte mit Sir John de Moels mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. August 1337 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Lovel è nata il nel 1305 nel Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Muriel Soulis, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Sir John de Moels. Morì il 21 agosto 1337, nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Lovelが1305年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovelは29歳，母Muriel Soulisは26歳であった。彼女はSir John de Moelsとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1337年8月21日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Lovel(이)가 1305년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muriel Soulis(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de Moels(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 8월 21일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Lovel родилась в 1305 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel Soulis, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Sir John de Moels. Она умерла 21 августа 1337 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 32 лет.
